description: The foot/body stance (or, for hinge/row-family lifts, the torso-orientation variant) that distinguishes a movement from its sibling variations (variation facet, §6.3). Distinct from barPosition (bar placement on the back), which never co-occurs with stance on the same exercise in data/exercises.json. Open token; unknown values round-trip (§3.3, §5.9). Includes 'conventional', 'romanian', and 'bent-over', already in use in data/exercises.json (deadlift, RDL, bent-over row).

tokens.label: Sumo Stance
tokens.description: Wide stance with toes turned out, hands inside the legs (deadlift).

tokens.label: Close Stance
tokens.description: Feet placed narrower than hip width.

tokens.label: Wide Stance
tokens.description: Feet placed wider than hip width (not sumo-specific).

tokens.label: Staggered Stance
tokens.description: One foot forward of the other (e.g. staggered-stance RDL, split squat).

tokens.label: Romanian
tokens.description: Romanian deadlift's hip-hinge stance/ROM variant: minimal knee bend, bar travels to mid-shin.

tokens.label: Bent-Over
tokens.description: Torso hinged forward and held static through the set (e.g. bent-over row).
